_readme: Niche -> Instagram hashtags for niche-radar.py (the DISCOVERY engine). ELIJAH: edit freely. Bare hashtags (no '#', no URL). Seeded 2026-06-29 from YOUR last-month top hashtags (intel: ai/claude/founder/startup/business/cars + your explicit asks) MINUS the reach-spam tags (#fyp/#viral/#reels/#life) which return random global junk and waste credit. niche-radar SCRAPES these (official Graph API hashtag endpoints are App-Review-blocked for this app -> OAuthException #10), gets TRUE view counts, ranks per niche, and suggests winning NEW accounts into watchlist.json. Add/cut tags to taste; broad job-title tags (ceo/software/developer) are noisy on IG -- prune them if their results look off.

_budget.actor: apify/instagram-hashtag-scraper (official, field-verified; the only actor whose INPUT is a hashtag AND output has view counts)
_budget.cost_model: pay-per-result; Free tier $2.60/1,000 results, hard $5/mo credit (no rollover). ~30 results/hashtag = ~$0.08. resultsLimit is PER hashtag, so cost = results x (#hashtags). Keep total hashtags <= ~12 at 30 results to stay inside the free $5/mo.
_budget.cheaper_option_if_scaling: apidojo/instagram-scraper is ~5x cheaper (~$0.50/1k, 4.86 stars) but community-maintained + uses hashtag-EXPLORE URLs and possibly different field names -- NOT wired (would need a verified per-actor input/field branch). Only worth it if the hashtag list grows past the free tier.
_budget.free_local_verdict: There is NO free/local/OSS path that returns hashtag view counts without an Instagram LOGIN (= ban risk to @elijahaifl). Never run instaloader/instagrapi/gallery-dl on the real account. Apify scrapes logged-off (zero account risk).
_budget.bright_data_note: Bright Data offers ~5k free credits/mo (would make this $0) BUT the hub docs contradict each other (CONTENT-INTEL-PROTOCOL='Winner' vs AGENT-TEAM-BLUEPRINT='Tier C skip'). Unresolved -- Elijah to decide before adopting; higher switching cost (different API/auth) than the actor swap above.
